seo.title: Rasiga Rasiga Lyrics Star
seo.description: Full Rasiga Rasiga songs lyrics, Star Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Piraisoodan, Music: AR Rahman, Singer(s): SPB, Sujatha Mohan.
seo.keywords: Piraisoodan, Star, AR Rahman, SPB, Sujatha Mohan, Rasiga Rasiga full lyrics, Star songs lyrics, Rasiga Rasiga lyrics snippets, Rasiga Rasiga WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Rasiga Rasiga lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Rasiga Rasiga'?

The song 'Rasiga Rasiga' expresses the joy and excitement of love, celebrating the feelings associated with a romantic relationship.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Star'?

In the movie Star, the song plays during a romantic sequence, highlighting the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of 'Rasiga Rasiga'?

The song is beautifully sung by the legendary SPB and the talented Sujatha Mohan.

Who composed the music for 'Rasiga Rasiga'?

The music for 'Rasiga Rasiga' was composed by the renowned AR Rahman, known for his innovative soundtracks.

When was 'Rasiga Rasiga' released?

'Rasiga Rasiga' was released on July 17, 2001.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Star, the song Rasiga Rasiga serves as a celebration of love, capturing the joyous moments shared between the protagonists. The enchanting melody, composed by AR Rahman, is brought to life by the harmonious voices of SPB and Sujatha Mohan. The lyrics, penned by Piraisoodan, beautifully convey the emotions of infatuation and delight. This romantic duet resonates with listeners, evoking feelings of happiness and nostalgia.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rasiga Rasiga from the movie Star is a delightful romantic duet that showcases the enchanting vocals of SPB and Sujatha Mohan. With AR Rahman's magical composition, this song captures the essence of love and joy, making it a timeless favorite. Dive into the melodious world of Rasiga Rasiga and experience the vibrant emotions it evokes.
stanzaMeanings: Enjoy, enjoy, my enjoy, enjoy, girl enjoy, the one who stole me, enjoy.
Enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, girl enjoy, enjoy, the one who stole me, enjoy.
My enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, girl enjoy, oh enjoy, enjoy, the one who stole me, enjoy.
Girl enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, girl enjoy, oh enjoy, enjoy, the one who has captivated me, enjoy.
She walks in a way that makes the earth shine, it brings joy to the heart.
Today she stands, shining in the sky, it is not a heavenly sight, nor a spring sight.
That Egyptian mummy will awaken, if she smiles, it will bring life to the dead.
Here the earth and the moon, she swings in her eyes, swinging back and forth, in the crescent moon, the angel dances.
She is the one who brings flowers to the festival, she ties them together, catches the lightning, and makes it dance.
Enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, girl enjoy, enjoy, the one who stole me, enjoy.
Enjoy, enjoy, your enjoy, enjoy, girl enjoy, your enjoy.
Enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, girl enjoy, enjoy, the one who stole me, enjoy.
Enjoy, enjoy, your enjoy, enjoy, girl enjoy, your enjoy.
That word of beauty from Mumtaz still shines in Agra.
That word that brings life to the heart still brings joy without any sorrow.
Even bitter poison tastes sweet, love's sorrow is washed away without soap.
My enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, girl enjoy, oh enjoy, enjoy, the one who stole me, enjoy.
She is the one who brings flowers to the festival, she ties them together, catches the lightning, and makes it dance.
Without seeking the rain, there is no sculpture; without seeking the eyes, there is no love.
Without seeking the rain, the earth is touched. Without seeking the heart, there is no love for the girl.
Within oneself, seeking brings knowledge. Seeking the girl brings poetry.
Seeking with fingers brings music. Seeking with seeds brings dawn.
Seeking brings dawn.
Enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, girl enjoy, enjoy, the one who stole me, enjoy.
Enjoy, enjoy, your enjoy, enjoy, girl enjoy, your enjoy.
Enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, enjoy, girl enjoy, enjoy, the one who stole me, enjoy.
